name: Burgess Principle Check
description: Evaluates whether an automated decision affecting an individual passes the Burgess Principle binary test.

tool.name: burgess_principle_check
tool.description: Accepts a description of an automated decision and returns pass or fail, reasoning, and recommended remediation if failed.

decision.description: Description of the automated decision or proposed action affecting an individual.

individual.description: Identifier or description of the affected individual.

intendedEffect.description: Expected effect of the decision on the individual.

decisionLogic.goal: Determine whether the affected person was considered as an individual human being or processed as a unit within a system.
decisionLogic.passCondition: Return pass only when the decision includes individual-specific consideration tied to the affected person.
decisionLogic.failCondition: Return fail when the decision is based only on generalized categories, bulk processing, or unexplained automation.
decisionLogic.failureBehavior: Recommend halting the action, flagging it for review, and gathering individual-specific context before retrying.
